free_text: Angular anisotropy and cross section for fission of
nuclei in the region Z=73-83 by 38-MeV alpha particles
- Backing: Copper backing except for self-supporting Ta
Many cross sections are published twice in the Sov.J.
Nucl.Phys. and the 1971 conference proceedings, but
it is not clear which one gives the final data.
